_about: Personal additions/removals/renames, applied last (over pinned and computed data). Copy this file to data/overrides.json (gitignored, never fetched from anywhere) and edit. This is deliberately separate from calibration.json: calibration tunes the astronomy, overrides change what appears in YOUR calendar.

add.en: Example: local gurdwara barsi (fixed Nanakshahi date every year)
Example: one-off event pinned to a single Gregorian date
